history.en: Developed in the 1830s at the royal kennels of Compiègne, France, from crossings between English Pointers and French Braque breeds, believed to involve an English Pointer gifted to King Charles X. Named after the Saint-Germain-en-Laye region and recognized by the FCI as a versatile gundog
history.zh: 19世纪30年代在法国贡比涅皇家犬舍培育而成，通过杂交英国指示犬与法国布拉克犬，据信涉及一只赠予查理十世国王的英国指示犬。以圣日耳曼昂莱地区命名，获FCI认可为多功能猎犬。

overview.en: The Braque Saint-Germain is a versatile sporting dog known for its gentle, intelligent, and affectionate nature. Developed in 1830s France from English Pointer and French Braque lines, this breed embodies eagerness to please and unwavering loyalty. As a medium-sized gundog, it combines athletic grace with a calm, friendly demeanor, making it an excellent companion for active families. Its keen nose and natural pointing instinct make it exceptional in the field, while its sensitive and people-oriented personality thrives on human companionship. The breed is typically good-natured with children and other dogs, though it requires consistent socialization. Braque Saint-Germains are not suited for prolonged isolation; they form deep bonds with their owners and can become anxious if left alone too often. Their moderate energy level means they enjoy both vigorous exercise and quiet indoor time, adapting well to various living situations as long as their need for interaction and activity is met.
overview.zh: 圣日耳曼布拉可犬是一种多才多艺的猎犬，以其温和、聪明和深情的天性而闻名。该品种于19世纪30年代在法国由英国指示犬和法国布拉可犬杂交培育而成，体现了乐于取悦和忠诚的特质。作为中型猎犬，它兼具运动优雅与冷静友善的气质，是活跃家庭的绝佳伴侣。其敏锐的嗅觉和天生的指示本能使其在野外表现出色，而敏感且以人为导向的个性则依赖与主人的亲密互动。该品种通常对孩子和其他犬类友善，但需要持续的社会化训练。圣日耳曼布拉可犬不适合长期独处；它们与主人建立深厚纽带，若频繁被单独留在家中可能会产生焦虑。其适中的精力水平意味着它们既享受剧烈运动，也喜欢安静的室内时光，只要满足其互动和活动需求，就能适应多种生活环境。

care.en: Daily care for the Braque Saint-Germain is straightforward but requires consistency. Grooming is minimal due to its short, dense coat; weekly brushing with a rubber curry comb or soft bristle brush removes loose hair and distributes skin oils. Bathe only when necessary, as over-bathing can strip natural oils. Clean ears weekly to prevent infections, especially after outdoor activities, and trim nails monthly if not naturally worn down. Exercise is crucial—this breed needs at least 60 minutes of daily activity, including off-leash running in a safe area, long walks, or retrieving games. They excel in dog sports like agility, obedience, or field trials. Veterinary visits should be annual for check-ups and vaccinations, with semi-annual visits recommended as they age. Common health concerns include hip dysplasia, ear infections, and bloat; monitor for symptoms and maintain a healthy weight. Brush teeth several times weekly using dog-safe toothpaste.
care.zh: 圣日耳曼布拉可犬的日常护理简单但需坚持。其短密被毛打理轻松，每周用橡胶梳或软毛刷梳理一次即可去除死毛并分布皮脂。仅在必要时洗澡，过度清洁会破坏天然油脂。每周清洁耳朵以防感染，尤其在户外活动后；每月修剪指甲（若未自然磨损）。运动至关重要——该品种每天至少需要60分钟活动，包括安全区域的自由奔跑、长途散步或寻回游戏。它们擅长敏捷赛、服从赛或野外测试等犬类运动。兽医检查建议每年一次常规体检和疫苗接种，老年犬建议每半年一次。常见健康问题包括髋关节发育不良、耳部感染和胃扭转；需关注症状并保持健康体重。每周用犬用牙膏刷牙数次。

training.en: Training a Braque Saint-Germain is a rewarding experience due to its high intelligence, eagerness to please, and sensitive nature. Use positive reinforcement methods exclusively—praise, treats, and play work far better than harsh corrections, which can cause anxiety or shutdown. Start socialization and basic obedience early, ideally from 8 weeks of age, exposing the puppy to various people, animals, sounds, and environments. This breed excels in field training thanks to its natural pointing and retrieving instincts, but also enjoys trick training and nose work. Keep sessions short (10–15 minutes) and engaging to prevent boredom. Consistency is key; all family members should use the same commands. Due to their sensitivity, avoid repetitive drills—vary activities to maintain interest. They respond well to clicker training. For hunting work, professional guidance from a bird dog trainer is recommended to refine their natural abilities without dampening their spirit.
training.zh: 训练圣日耳曼布拉可犬是一种愉悦的体验，因其高智商、乐于取悦和敏感的天性。务必使用积极强化法——表扬、零食和游戏远比严厉纠正更有效，后者可能导致焦虑或退缩。从8周龄起尽早开始社会化和基础服从训练，让幼犬接触不同的人、动物、声音和环境。该品种凭借天生的指示和寻回本能，在野外训练中表现出色，同时也喜欢技巧训练和嗅觉工作。保持训练简短（10–15分钟）且有趣，以防厌倦。一致性至关重要；所有家庭成员应使用相同口令。由于其敏感性，避免重复性练习——变换活动以维持兴趣。它们对响片训练反应良好。对于狩猎训练，建议在专业猎犬教练指导下进行，以精炼其自然能力而不抑制其天性。

diet.en: The Braque Saint-Germain thrives on a high-quality, balanced diet appropriate for its life stage (puppy, adult, senior). Choose a dog food with real meat as the first ingredient, moderate protein (22–28%), and healthy fats for energy and coat condition. Avoid fillers like corn, wheat, and soy. Adult dogs typically need 2–3 cups of dry food daily, split into two meals, but adjust based on activity level, metabolism, and body condition. Puppies require three to four smaller meals per day. Given the breed's risk of bloat (gastric dilatation-volvulus), feed from a slow-feeder bowl, avoid exercise one hour before and after meals, and never feed one large daily meal. Fresh water must always be available. Supplement with omega-3 fatty acids (fish oil) for skin and joint health, especially for active or older dogs. Avoid table scraps and high-fat treats. Consult your veterinarian for personalized portion recommendations and to address any food sensitivities.
diet.zh: 圣日耳曼布拉可犬需要适合其生命阶段（幼犬、成犬、老年犬）的高质量均衡饮食。选择以真实肉类为首要成分、蛋白质含量适中（22–28%）且含健康脂肪的犬粮，以提供能量并维护被毛。避免玉米、小麦和大豆等填充物。成犬通常每天需2–3杯干粮，分两餐喂食，但需根据活动量、新陈代谢和体况调整。幼犬每天需三至四顿小餐。鉴于该品种有胃扭转风险，应使用慢食碗喂食，餐前餐后一小时内避免运动，且切勿每日只喂一大餐。务必提供新鲜饮水。可添加Omega-3脂肪酸（鱼油）维护皮肤和关节健康，尤其对活跃或老年犬。避免喂食残羹和高脂零食。请咨询兽医获取个性化份量建议，并解决任何食物敏感问题。

livingTips.en: The Braque Saint-Germain adapts well to various living situations but thrives best in a home with a securely fenced yard where it can run freely. While it can live in an apartment if given sufficient daily exercise, a house with outdoor space is ideal. This breed is not a couch potato—it needs ample physical and mental stimulation to prevent destructive behaviors. It is excellent with children, often patient and playful, but supervision with very young kids is recommended due to its size and energy. It generally gets along well with other dogs, especially if raised together, but may chase small pets due to its hunting instincts. Early socialization helps curb this. The breed dislikes being left alone for long hours; it can develop separation anxiety and may bark or chew. Consider a dog walker or daycare if you work full-time. Climate-wise, its short coat offers limited protection from extreme cold, so provide a coat in winter and ensure shade and water in hot weather. Overall, it is a loving, adaptable companion for active individuals or families.
livingTips.zh: 圣日耳曼布拉可犬能适应多种生活环境，但在有安全围栏院子的家中表现最佳，可自由奔跑。虽然若每日运动充足也能住公寓，但有户外空间的房子更为理想。该品种不是沙发犬——需要充分的身心刺激以防破坏行为。它对孩子极佳，通常耐心且爱玩耍，但因体型和精力，与幼童互动时建议监护。它通常与其他犬类相处融洽，尤其是一起长大的，但可能因狩猎本能追逐小宠物。早期社会化有助于抑制此行为。该品种不喜欢长时间独处；可能产生分离焦虑并出现吠叫或啃咬行为。若您全职工作，可考虑雇佣遛狗人或送犬日托。气候方面，其短毛对严寒保护有限，冬季需穿保暖衣，夏季确保阴凉和饮水。总之，它是活跃个人或家庭的深情、适应性强的伴侣。
